title: Basit Hesap Makinesi
subtitle: Toplama, cikarma, carpma, bolme islemleri.
code:
<?php

function calculate(float $a, float $b, string $op) {
    switch ($op) {
        case "+": return $a + $b;
        case "-": return $a - $b;
        case "*": return $a * $b;
        case "/":
            if ($b == 0) {
                echo "Hata: Sifira bolme!\n";
                return null;
            }
            return $a / $b;
        default:
            echo "Gecersiz islem: " . $op . "\n";
            return null;
    }
}

$x = 15;
$y = 4;

echo "x = " . $x . ", y = " . $y . "\n";
echo "x + y = " . calculate($x, $y, "+") . "\n";
echo "x - y = " . calculate($x, $y, "-") . "\n";
echo "x * y = " . calculate($x, $y, "*") . "\n";
echo "x / y = " . calculate($x, $y, "/") . "\n";

echo "\nSifira bolme testi:\n";
calculate(10, 0, "/");

// Yuzde hesaplama
$total = 250;
$discount = 15;
$finalPrice = $total - ($total * $discount / 100);
echo "\n" . $total . " TL'nin %" . $discount . " indirimli hali: " . $finalPrice . " TL\n";

?>
